workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Give me the manager view on this Parnell Aerospace meeting transcript. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-05 12:42 EST
Subject: QBR preparation - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about QBR preparation. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 11:52 EST
Subject: QBR preparation - Action Required

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-06 17:29 EST
Subject: URGENT: QBR preparation Issue at Parnell Aerospace

Our team encountered some challenges with QBR preparation. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Parnell Aerospace: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-N trap (No native 'renewal motion' workflow in skill set -- current design synthesizes); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-N failure mode (No native 'renewal motion' workflow in skill set -- current design synthesizes)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct QBR preparation decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-N -- No native 'renewal motion' workflow in skill set -- current design synthesizes
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
